title: Colored Lamps: Relighted
description: Mod that adds Dynamic and Static colored light sources to Minecraft
body:
# ‼️ WARNING: Flashing lights ‼️
This mod contains flashing lights that may cause discomfort or trigger seizures for people with photosensitive epilepsy. Please play with caution!

# ❓ About Mod
**Colored Lamps** is a utility mod that adds 16 Dynamic and 16 Static colored light sources to Minecraft. All lamps (especially the Static ones) function similarly to the Vanilla Light Block, making them perfect for map makers and decorators.

![Colored lamps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/924e742bb16221391196dc6ff52971d436141d72.png)

# ✨ Dynamic Light Patterns
Dynamic lamps feature a lighting system inspired by Source Engine games. Use **Shift + RMB** to cycle through 7 different patterns:
- **Steady**: Consistent light.
- **Flicker**: Natural flickering.
- **Flicker 1**: More aggressive flickering.
- **Fluorescent**: Imitates a faulty fluorescent tube.
- **Slow Pulse**: Smoothly fading in and out.
- **Strobe**: Rapid flashing (**Epilepsy Warning**).
- **Candle**: Gentle, chaotic trembling of a flame.

## Here's example of Slow Pulse Light:
![Pulse Light Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77555654ba9aa2c0424bc82aae7881f3c27dd03a_0.webp)
![Pulse Light Example 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2da8ce4a14f00bcdd0395e573aeacb58a6f679e2_0.webp)

# ℹ️ Controls & Customization
- **Right Click (RMB)**: Cycle through brightness levels (0-15).
- **Shift + RMB**: Change the light pattern (Dynamic lamps only).
- **Stick + RMB**: Increase flicker delay (makes it slower).
- **Flint + RMB**: Decrease flicker delay (makes it faster).
- **Hold any Lamp**: Reveals all invisible light blocks in a 16-block radius with colored outlines.

# 🔗 Compatibility 
**CRITICAL**: This mod requires [Colorful Lighting](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-lighting) or [Colorful Lighting (Sodium Compat)](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-lighting-sodium-compat) to display actual colored light.

Yes, it also works well with Embeddium.

# ⚠️ Performance
**WARNING**: Having many dynamic lights updating simultaneously can cause lag. Use them wisely! For large-scale decorations, please use the **Static** versions of the lamps.
